top_signals.title: US Stocks Rise as Traders Weigh Warsh Remarks, Manufacturing
top_signals.summary: US stocks pared earlier losses as fresh economic data painted a picture of resilience, while traders assessed commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: One Almost-Goldilocks Report
top_signals.summary: While we wait for the jobs data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: New York, Chicago Grids Strain as Record Heat Wave Expands
top_signals.summary:
Power grids from Chicago to New York City are bracing for sky-high demand as sweltering heat begins to build across the eastern half of the US.  
Bloomberg News Meteorologist Rob Carolan breaks down what to expect as temperatures rise. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
top_signals.summary: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
